name: Angela Ahrendts
currentRole: Board Member and Advisor, multiple companies
formerRole: Senior Vice President, Retail at Apple Inc
connectionToCompany: Served as Apple's SVP of Retail from 2014 to 2019, reporting directly to Tim Cook and overseeing Apple's global retail and online stores

verificationNote: WRONG COMPANY corrected: Gemini indicates she is a board member at Ralph Lauren, Airbnb, and WPP, not Burberry. She was formerly CEO of Burberry before joining Apple. companyAffiliation updated to reflect current board roles. Retained as her Apple SVP background remains relevant.
